title: Pre-Bitcoin Digital Cash Attempts
description: Before Bitcoin, multiple designs tried to create digital money, including DigiCash, Hashcash, b-money, and bit gold. Studying these attempts clarifies what Bitcoin solved and what tradeoffs remained unresolved.

resources.title: b-money
resources.notes: Historical overview of Wei Dai's proposal and its relation to Bitcoin.

resources.title: Nick Szabo: Bit Gold
resources.notes: Primary proposal for bit gold, a key precursor concept.

resources.title: Hashcash
resources.notes: Background on proof-of-work used in anti-spam and later adapted by Bitcoin.

resources.title: DigiCash
resources.notes: Early private digital cash system and its centralization tradeoffs.
